meaning: 麦地那[沙特阿拉伯西部城市](伊斯兰教创立人穆罕默德的陵墓所在地,伊斯兰教圣地之一) ;n.(北非城市中的) 阿拉伯人(或非欧洲人) 聚居区
examples: American Idol initially portrayed Chris Medina as a star in the making.
The main commercial street that leads to the medina starts from here.
"The Jewel of Medina" has since been released in America, but it remains under wraps in Britain.
On my way out, I asked Medina when he put his Korean taco on the menu.
Twenty hours later, the couple arrived from New York in Medina, Islam's second-holiest city after Mecca.
